calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Feb-23-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-13-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated December 24, 2009, is admitted to probate. Tiffany M. G. Delloue is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for February 23, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
